creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 204746
maxima - Update to 5.43.0

Update to 5.43.0.

Changelog: https://sourceforge.net/p/maxima/code/ci/5.43.0/tree/ChangeLog-5.43.md

Moreover:

- Moves NO_ARCH consistently with the recommended variables order.
- Simplifies pkg-plist by defining PORTDOCS, PORTDATA and PORTEXAMPLES variables.

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.2,12.0}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
